response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and significant leadership in technical projects, including developer tools (MCP code generators, AI-agent infrastructure) and build systems (CI/CD, trunk-based development). However, his people management experience is limited to voluntary/training roles rather than formal team leadership, and his mobile-platform experience is minimal. His technical leadership is strong, but the lack of direct people management in a mid-to-senior role and limited mobile ecosystem exposure slightly reduces his fit.
strengths: Deep technical expertise in developer tools and build systems (e.g., MCP, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Proven leadership in technical projects and mentoring (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course, workshops)
Strong background in cross-functional collaboration and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Limited formal people management experience (only training/volunteer roles, not a full-time team lead)
Minimal direct experience with mobile-platform ecosystems or testing infrastructure for mobile apps
Recent roles (2021–2025) lack clear alignment with developer tools/build systems for a large mobile platform
